text:
You've worked *against* your point by showing how huge of a difference there is between someone with a fetish and someone who actually has the intention to harm others.

BDSM is a thing, too. If anything, *that* would be the (most directly "evil") fetish that your analogy would relate to. And even then, it's still pretty far-fetched considering how relatively widely accepted of a thing it's becoming and how little it actually relates to people actually being torturers.

text:
I pondered who this anime chick was in the video. I noticed this Gianneh character name her as "Noumi". I googled the name, and noticed she was part of a visual novel called "Little Busters!" Being a VN fan, I was pleased to see it had an english patch. I hence aquired the data for the visual novel along with an english patch.

And thanks to you, TheLaxOne, I am now a fan of Little Busters! You've done me a service I shall not soon forget. Little Busters! is as good as G-Senjou no Maou, indeed.
